message:
br-youhf: route ft CLI workflow runners through CxPolicyInjector

ft-youhf: WorkflowRunner::new now takes a CxPolicyInjector (workflows/mod.rs:89)
rather than the raw Arc<runtime_compat::Mutex<PolicyGatedInjector<_>>> that
five ft CLI sites in crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs still constructed by
hand. The type mismatch broke `cargo check -p frankenterm` with E0308
(and the earlier private-constructor shape produced E0624), so the ft
binary no longer built.

Replace each Arc::new(runtime_compat::Mutex::new(PolicyGatedInjector::with_storage(...)))
construction with CxPolicyInjector::new(PolicyGatedInjector::with_storage(...))
at the five affected sites (run_watcher auto-handle path + four
subcommand dispatch arms). CxPolicyInjector::new wraps the injector in
the same Arc<Mutex<>> internally, so runtime behaviour is identical;
this is purely a type-surface fix. Add CxPolicyInjector to each local
`use frankenterm_core::workflows::{...}` import.

Verified: `CC=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang
CXX=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-pane1-target cargo check -p frankenterm`
finishes clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
